category.name: zoo.window.recycling
category.item: You will find a lot of raw materials in the waste that you can recycle and produce valuable materials.

Your warehouse capacity: %count%
of the total capacity %maxcount%

Craft resources from collected waste. The time it takes to craft these materials is shown on the left. Below you can see the amount of waste needed and the number of zoogros. Choose how many resources you want to craft. Every time you craft something, you have a chance to get a rare resource. You can increase this chance by using the super filter.
Increase your chance of obtaining a rare resource by %percent%%
Chance of obtaining a rare resource: %percent%%

category.name: zoo.window.recycling.info
category.item: Use this material to craft the following items:
